First stable release of **Repo Growth**, a self-contained GitHub Action for tracking repository growth without a personal access token or external service.

## Highlights

- Track stars, forks, and GitHub Release asset downloads.
- Generate a modern SVG dashboard with automatic light and dark themes.
- Select any combination of metrics and control their display order.
- Generate a combined dashboard, separate charts, or both layouts.
- Preserve observed download totals when release assets are removed or replaced.
- Commit history and generated charts automatically with GitHub Actions.
- Keep all collected data as a readable JSON file in your own repository.

## Quick start

```yaml
- uses: MacRimi/repo-growth@v1
```

See the [README](https://github.com/MacRimi/repo-growth#quick-start) for the complete workflow and configuration options.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> Historical tracking begins with the first workflow run. Repo Growth does not reconstruct metrics from before installation.
